ats_utilities.console_io.reporter module¶

Info

Defines class ATSReporter with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for reporting messages.

class ats_utilities.console_io.reporter.ATSReporter(checker: IATSChecker | None = None, theme: IConsoleTheme | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: IATSReporter

Defines class ATSReporter with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for reporting messages. Reports status messages to the console.

It defines:

attributes:

None

methods:
error - Report error message to console.
success - Report success message to console.
verbose - Report verbose message to console.
warning - Report warning message to console.
__report(message: List[Any], color: str) → None¶

Utility method for reporting message to console.

Parameters:

  • message (<List[Any]>) – List with message components

  • color (<str>) – Theme color for the message

Exceptions:

ATSTypeError

_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
error(message: List[Any]) → None[source]¶

Report error message to console.

Parameters:

messages (<List[Any]>) – List with message components

Exceptions:

None

success(message: List[Any]) → None[source]¶

Report success message to console.

Parameters:

messages (<List[Any]>) – List with message components

Exceptions:

None

verbose(is_verbose: bool, message: List[Any]) → None[source]¶

Report verbose message to console.

Parameters:

  • is_verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

  • messages (<List[Any]>) – List with message components

Exceptions:

None

warning(message: List[Any]) → None[source]¶

Report warning message to console.

Parameters:

messages (<List[Any]>) – List with message components

Exceptions:

None
